raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I made an online purchase of XXXX silver coins from XXXX XXXX for {$95.00}. I received XXXX fake silver coins from XXXX XXXX. I attempted several times to contact the company but there was no response. I disputed this charge with BARCLAYS BANK and I was denied based on BARCLAYS BANK not being able to contact XXXX XXXX.
